ocl:
context KYCRecord
inv: (self.customer <> null) and (self.isVerified <> null)

context Account
inv: self.balance >= 34 and self.balance <= 51

context Bank
inv: self.branches->any(x | x.branchCode <> '') <> null

context CreditCard
inv: self.limit >= 61 and self.limit <= 62

context Loan
inv: if self.principal < self.interestRate then self.principal else self.interestRate endif >= 5

context CheckingAccount
inv: self.overdraftLimit >= 6 and self.overdraftLimit <= 73

context Loan
inv: self.principal <> null and self.interestRate <> null

context Address
inv: (self.customer <> null) and (not(self.customer <> null))

context Loan
inv: (self.interestRate <> null implies self.principal <> null) and (not(self.interestRate <> null implies self.principal <> null))

context Customer
inv: (self.loans->forAll(x | x.principal >= 1)) and (not(self.loans->forAll(x | x.principal >= 1)))

context Payment
inv: (self.transaction <> null) and (not(self.transaction <> null))

context Bank
inv: (self.branches->any(x | x.city <> '') <> null) and (not(self.branches->any(x | x.city <> '') <> null))

context Teller
inv: (self.counterNo mod 5 = 0) and (not(self.counterNo mod 5 = 0))

context Bank
inv: (self.branches->excluding(self.branches->any(true))->size() < self.branches->size()) and (not(self.branches->excluding(self.branches->any(true))->size() < self.branches->size()))

context Address
inv: (self.country <> null and self.line1 <> null) and (not(self.country <> null and self.line1 <> null))
